items.title: Citizen profile prefill for permit journeys
items.description: Auto-populate verified citizen profile attributes at permit initiation to reduce re-entry and form errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Verified profile fields are prefilled in less than 2 seconds.
Users can override optional fields with audit logging.

items.title: Document vault API for permit attachments
items.description: Expose secure API endpoints for attachment retrieval and checksum validation across permit services.
acceptanceCriteria: Signed URL access expires within configured policy windows.
Checksum mismatch events are blocked and logged.

items.title: Payment gateway status webhook handling
items.description: Process asynchronous settlement and failure callbacks from the payment partner to keep permit state accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook retries are idempotent and do not duplicate transactions.
Permit status updates are visible in the operator timeline.

items.title: License renewal eligibility rules engine
items.description: Apply policy checks for SME license renewal based on compliance and outstanding obligations.
acceptanceCriteria: Ineligible applications provide transparent reason codes.
Rule outcomes are versioned for governance audits.

items.title: Permit reminder notification orchestration
items.description: Trigger reminder notifications for pending permit steps through email and SMS channels.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification templates support Arabic and English variants.
Delivery failures are queued for retry with backoff policy.

items.title: Bilingual content parity verification
items.description: Automated checks ensure parity between Arabic and English permit instructions and labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Mismatch reports are generated during CI validation.
Critical translation gaps fail the release gate.

items.title: Fraud signal adapter for payment retries
items.description: Integrate fraud scoring service for repeated payment failures before allowing retry attempts.
acceptanceCriteria: High-risk retries are automatically blocked.
Fraud decisions are traceable in operational logs.

items.title: Inspector audit trail search enhancements
items.description: Enable filtering and search by permit state transitions for compliance and inspection teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Filters support actor, stage, and date range.
Search results return within 3 seconds for 90th percentile queries.

items.title: SLA breach early warning dashboard
items.description: Expose at-risk permit cases based on SLA thresholds for proactive intervention by supervisors.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard highlights permits exceeding warning threshold windows.
Exported alerts include ownership and next action recommendations.

items.title: Service outage status banner integration
items.description: Display service outage notifications in permit journeys with real-time status updates from incident tooling.
acceptanceCriteria: Banner activation is controlled by incident severity state.
Banner content is localized and accessibility-compliant.

items.title: Permit category mapping migration
items.description: Migrate legacy permit category mappings into the normalized taxonomy used by the new workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration script reports unknown category exceptions.
Roll-back scripts are tested in staging before production cutover.

items.title: Consent capture and revocation journey
items.description: Implement explicit consent capture for data sharing and self-service revocation in citizen profile settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Consent events are retained with immutable timestamps.
Revoked consent immediately blocks downstream sharing APIs.

items.title: Appointment slot optimization batch
items.description: Optimize appointment slot allocations nightly based on demand patterns and no-show rates.
acceptanceCriteria: Optimization output includes confidence scores per slot recommendation.
Operations can manually override generated slot plans.

items.title: Identity federation timeout hardening
items.description: Improve resiliency for identity federation timeouts and refresh failures during peak traffic windows.
acceptanceCriteria: Timeout retries follow exponential backoff with max cap.
Authentication errors expose user-safe fallback messaging.

items.title: Inspector mobile checklist synchronization
items.description: Synchronize offline inspector checklist updates once network connectivity is restored.
acceptanceCriteria: Conflict resolution prompts inspectors when stale edits are detected.
Synchronized updates preserve original capture timestamps.

items.title: Corporate delegated access management
items.description: Allow corporate administrators to delegate permit actions to authorized employees with scope controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Delegation scope supports service, duration, and action-level permissions.
Revoked delegates lose access within one minute.

items.title: Attachment malware scanning pipeline
items.description: Scan uploaded attachments through malware detection before persistence and downstream processing.
acceptanceCriteria: Known threat signatures are quarantined automatically.
False positive overrides require supervisor approval.

items.title: Data retention policy executor
items.description: Automate retention and archival jobs according to legal policy windows for permit records.
acceptanceCriteria: Retention jobs generate auditable execution reports.
Archived records remain discoverable by authorized compliance users.

items.title: Program increment objective telemetry
items.description: Capture objective progress metrics aligned to PI commitments for leadership reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Objective completion percentages are refreshed hourly.
Variance indicators highlight red/amber objectives automatically.

items.title: Cross-team dependency heatmap export
items.description: Provide exportable heatmap of delivery dependencies to support weekly ART sync reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: Export includes dependency severity and owner team.
Heatmap view is available in both JSON and CSV outputs.

items.title: Public API rate limit policy update
items.description: Introduce adaptive rate-limit policy tiers for public permit APIs to improve service stability.
acceptanceCriteria: Burst traffic is throttled without impacting premium partner channels.
Rate-limit decisions are logged with policy version metadata.

items.title: Dispute evidence package generator
items.description: Compile complete dispute evidence bundles including payment events, audit trail, and policy decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Evidence bundle includes immutable event hashes.
Generated package is downloadable in less than 10 seconds for standard cases.

items.title: Release readiness go/no-go checklist automation
items.description: Automate release governance checklist generation using sprint completion signals and risk posture.
acceptanceCriteria: Checklist reflects open risks, unresolved dependencies, and test coverage.
Approver comments are persisted for governance traceability.

items.title: Accessibility remediation for permit wizard
items.description: Resolve key WCAG issues in the permit wizard journey for keyboard and screen-reader users.
acceptanceCriteria: Wizard supports full keyboard navigation without focus traps.
Screen-reader labels and error messaging pass accessibility audits.
